items.title: No-op Docs Sync Verification in M C Ps 🚫
items.summary: This update confirms that the `overview` documentation is not mapped to any services in the MCPs repository. Verification showed that there are no corresponding MCP packages or OpenAPI specs for `overview`, resulting in no required updates. The PR serves as a no-op sync verification for the recent Docs update.

items.title: Docs parity verified for midjourney endpoints in M C Ps ✅
items.summary: This PR confirms that the MCP tools fully match the current Docs OpenAPI for `midjourney` endpoints. All endpoint paths, request enums, and task/query parameters are aligned with the specification. No code changes were needed as no drift was detected. The `overview` package was checked but requires no updates.
